summary: Tested NIA page refactoring from monolithic 3120-line file to modular directory structure with 10 component files. All features verified: NIA page loads without errors, Intel Overview shows 4 metric cards with correct data-testid attributes, Report Card and Learning Progress panels expanded by default, Data Collection panel with 3 clickable tabs (Coverage, Collect, Progress), Historical Simulations panel collapses/expands correctly, Testing & Scanning panel has 2 tabs (Market Scanner, Advanced Testing) that switch correctly, AI Modules & Connectors panel has 2 tabs (Performance, Connectors) that switch correctly, Strategy Pipeline panel has 2 tabs (Lifecycle, Promotions) that switch correctly, Refresh Intel button triggers data refresh, NIA v3.0 footer visible at bottom.

details: NIA page container found with data-testid='nia-page'
NIA title displays 'NIA Neural Intelligence Agency'
No console errors during page load
Page loads within acceptable time after startup modal dismissed
Intel Overview section found with data-testid='intel-overview'
4 metric cards present: ai-accuracy, strategies-live, learning-health, calibrations-today
All metric cards have correct data-testid attributes
Report Card panel found with data-testid='report-card-panel'
Panel expanded by default as expected
Toggle button found with data-testid='report-card-toggle'
Shows 'No trading data yet' message when no trades exist
Learning Progress panel found with data-testid='learning-progress-panel'
Panel expanded by default as expected
Toggle button found with data-testid='learning-progress-toggle'
Shows progress bars for AI Model Training, Scanner Calibration, Prediction Tracking, Strategy Simulations
Data Collection panel found with data-testid='data-collection-panel'
3 tabs present: Coverage, Collect, Progress
All tabs clickable with data-testid='collection-tab-{name}'
Tab switching works correctly
Historical Simulations panel found with data-testid='simulation-panel'
Panel collapsed by default
Toggle button found with data-testid='simulation-panel-toggle'
Expand/collapse animation works correctly
Testing & Scanning panel found with data-testid='testing-tools-panel'
Panel collapsed by default
2 tabs present: Market Scanner, Advanced Testing
Tab switching works correctly with data-testid='testing-tab-scanner' and 'testing-tab-advanced'
AI Modules & Connectors panel found with data-testid='ai-modules-panel'
Panel collapsed by default
2 tabs present: Performance, Connectors
Tab switching works correctly with data-testid='ai-tab-performance' and 'ai-tab-connectors'
Strategy Pipeline panel found with data-testid='strategy-pipeline-panel'
Panel collapsed by default
2 tabs present: Lifecycle, Promotions
Tab switching works correctly with data-testid='pipeline-tab-lifecycle' and 'pipeline-tab-promotions'
Refresh Intel button found with data-testid='nia-refresh-btn'
Button clickable and triggers data refresh
Shows 'Refreshing...' state during refresh
NIA v3.0 footer visible at bottom of page
Footer text: 'NIA v3.0 • Neural Intelligence Agency • Part of SentCom'

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring from 3120-line monolithic file to 10 modular components is well-structured
All panels have correct data-testid attributes for automation testing
Default expand states work as expected (Report Card and Learning Progress expanded, others collapsed)
Tab switching in merged panels (Data Collection, Testing Tools, AI Modules, Strategy Pipeline) works correctly
Shared constants (phaseColors, phaseIcons) properly extracted to constants.js
API calls in DataCollectionPanel correctly use centralized api utility
context_for_next_testing_agent: NIA page refactoring verified. All 10 modular components working correctly. Startup modal requires ~15 seconds to complete checks before 'Get Started' button becomes clickable. Navigate to NIA via 2nd sidebar button (Brain icon). Report Card and Learning Progress panels are expanded by default, all other panels collapsed. Data Collection panel has its own 15s polling cycle.
